releaseNotes.releaseNotesTooltip:
What's new in DOCA 1.5.1 for Multiple DPUs:
  • Bug fixes and stability enhancements.
  • Support Rocky Linux on DPU and Host (Comm Channel is not supported).
  • Support CentOS 8.2 on DPU and on Host.
  • DOCA Blueman service GA.
  • IPSec tunnel mode [Beta].
Open Release Notes

groups.name: DOCA Software Package
groups.description: Software Development Kit Package for developing Host software. Contains Runtime libraries, DOCA SDK and Tools for Developers and Administrators.

groups.name: Development Container on Host
groups.description: Linux Based BlueField Arm Emulated Container for Developers

groups.name: BlueField OS
groups.description: Bootloader and root filesystem for the target device, flash tools and scripts for host.

groups.name: Firmware and Flashing Tools
groups.description: Tools for Image Flashing (MFT and Rshim)
